query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.supplierName, s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND(s.monthlyCost - s.monthlyRevenue, 2) as monthlyLoss,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  c.name as customerName,
  -- Identify the revenue pattern
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue IN (2.00, 4.00, 9.00, 18.00, 27.00, 35.00, 36.00) THEN 'SIP_CHANNEL_RATE'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue < 10 THEN 'TINY_REVENUE_MISMATCH'
    WHEN s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.monthlyRevenue < 50 THEN 'SASBOSS_PARTIAL_MATCH'
    ELSE 'COST_EXCEEDS_REVENUE'
  END as pattern
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100 < 0
ORDER BY s.supplierName, marginPct ASC;

  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  c.name as customerName,
  -- Identify the revenue pattern
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue IN (2.00, 4.00, 9.00, 18.00, 27.00, 35.00, 36.00) THEN 'SIP_CHANNEL_RATE'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue < 10 THEN 'TINY_REVENUE_MISMATCH'
    WHEN s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.monthlyRevenue < 50 THEN 'SASBOSS_PARTIAL_MATCH'
    ELSE 'COST_EXCEEDS_REVENUE'
  END as pattern
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100 < 0
ORDER BY s.supplierName, marginPct ASC;
